message:
🐛 Fix Insights dashboard: add route, search, stats, card metadata (#2045)

* ✨ Add Multi-Cluster Insights dashboard with 7 correlation cards

New "Insights" dashboard with dual-mode (heuristic + AI) correlation
engine that surfaces cross-cluster patterns invisible from single-cluster
views:

- Cross-Cluster Event Correlation: stacked timeline of warning events
- Cluster Delta Detector: side-by-side cluster comparison
- Cascade Impact Map: causal chain visualization across clusters
- Config Drift Heatmap: cluster-pair drift matrix
- Resource Imbalance Detector: fleet-wide CPU/memory skew
- Restart Correlation Matrix: app bug vs infra issue patterns
- Deployment Rollout Tracker: multi-cluster rollout progress

Core hook (useMultiClusterInsights) runs 7 heuristic algorithms on
cached data with demo fallback. All cards registered in card dialog
and dashboard in customize dialog. Sidebar entry with Lightbulb icon.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 Add /insights route, page component, search index, stats, and card metadata

The Insights sidebar link was opening the main dashboard because no
route or page component existed. This adds:

- Insights page component using DashboardPage
- /insights route in App.tsx with lazy loading and prefetch chunk
- 'insights' DashboardStatsType with stat blocks (clusters, insights, critical, warnings)
- Search index entries (DASHBOARD_NAMES, DASHBOARD_ROUTES, DASHBOARD_STORAGE)
- Card titles and descriptions in cardMetadata for all 7 insight cards

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -209,6 +209,15 @@ export const CARD_TITLES: Record<string, string> = {
   provider_health: 'Provider Health',
   // CoreDNS
   coredns_status: 'CoreDNS',
+
+  // Multi-cluster insights cards
+  cross_cluster_event_correlation: 'Cross-Cluster Event Correlation',
+  cluster_delta_detector: 'Cluster Delta Detector',
+  cascade_impact_map: 'Cascade Impact Map',
+  config_drift_heatmap: 'Config Drift Heatmap',
+  resource_imbalance_detector: 'Resource Imbalance Detector',
+  restart_correlation_matrix: 'Restart Correlation Matrix',
+  deployment_rollout_tracker: 'Deployment Rollout Tracker',
 }
 
 // Short descriptions shown via info icon tooltip in the card header
@@ -367,4 +376,13 @@ export const CARD_DESCRIPTIONS: Record<string, string> = {
   kube_chess: 'Chess game with Kubernetes-themed pieces.',
   // CoreDNS
   coredns_status: 'CoreDNS pod health, restart counts, and cluster status across clusters.',
+
+  // Multi-cluster insights cards
+  cross_cluster_event_correlation: 'Unified timeline showing correlated warning events across multiple clusters.',
+  cluster_delta_detector: 'Detects differences between clusters sharing the same workloads.',
+  cascade_impact_map: 'Visualizes how issues cascade across clusters over time.',
+  config_drift_heatmap: 'Cluster-pair matrix showing degree of configuration drift.',
+  resource_imbalance_detector: 'Detects CPU/memory utilization skew across the fleet.',
+  restart_correlation_matrix: 'Detects horizontal (app bug) vs vertical (infra issue) restart patterns.',
+  deployment_rollout_tracker: 'Tracks deployment rollout progress across clusters.',
 }

@@ -36,6 +36,7 @@ export type DashboardStatsType =
   | 'deploy'
   | 'ai-agents'
   | 'cluster-admin'
+  | 'insights'

  * Default stat blocks for the Clusters dashboard
@@ -345,6 +346,16 @@ export const AI_AGENTS_STAT_BLOCKS: StatBlockConfig[] = [
   { id: 'spiffe', name: 'SPIFFE', icon: 'ShieldCheck', visible: true, color: 'orange' },
 ]
 
+/**

+export const INSIGHTS_STAT_BLOCKS: StatBlockConfig[] = [
+  { id: 'clusters', name: 'Clusters', icon: 'Server', visible: true, color: 'purple' },
+  { id: 'insights', name: 'Insights', icon: 'Lightbulb', visible: true, color: 'blue' },
+  { id: 'critical', name: 'Critical', icon: 'AlertTriangle', visible: true, color: 'red' },
+  { id: 'warnings', name: 'Warnings', icon: 'AlertCircle', visible: true, color: 'yellow' },
+]
+
 /**
  * Get default stat blocks for a specific dashboard type
  */
@@ -386,6 +397,8 @@ export function getDefaultStatBlocks(dashboardType: DashboardStatsType): StatBlo
       return AI_AGENTS_STAT_BLOCKS
     case 'cluster-admin':
       return CLUSTER_ADMIN_STAT_BLOCKS
+    case 'insights':
+      return INSIGHTS_STAT_BLOCKS
     default:
       return []
   }
